name: Le Mans Predictions
summary: Dedicated forecasting for the 24 Hours of Le Mans.
description: Scaffolded on the shared MotorsportVerse core: a 24h of Le Mans project tree with DataSource and Predictor seams ready to implement. Inherits calibration, championship simulation, standings, evaluation, drift monitoring, and leakage guards from motorsport-core the moment a data feed is wired.
